description_long: This is a large, rectangular city bus with a predominantly white and gray body accented by a bold orange stripe running horizontally along its sides. The bus features a series of evenly spaced, rectangular windows with black frames, providing ample visibility for passengers. The front of the bus displays a digital sign reading 'SKETCHFAB' above the windshield, and the front fascia includes headlights, indicator lights, and a grille. The rear of the bus is equipped with multiple red tail lights, a pair of large rear windows, and various access panels. The bus rides on two axles with four visible wheels, each fitted with hubcaps. The overall design is utilitarian, with clean lines and a focus on passenger capacity and urban transit functionality.
description: A large, white and gray city bus with an orange stripe, rectangular windows, and a digital front sign. It features four wheels, prominent side windows, and detailed front and rear panels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bus, orange stripe, six large rectangular windows, and two wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying two large rear windows, multiple red tail lights, and access panels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0 with the same window and wheel arrangement.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the windshield, digital sign reading 'SKETCHFAB', headlights, and grille.
attribute_window_arrangement: Six large, evenly spaced rectangular windows on each side, separated by vertical pillars, all of similar size and shape.
